scripts.deploy: pnpm exec wrangler d1 migrations apply CACHE_DB --remote && pnpm exec wrangler deploy

AUTH_TOKEN.description: Bearer token for write operations (push). Generate with `openssl rand -hex 32`.

SIGNING_PRIVATE_KEY.description: Ed25519 private key in PEM format for signing narinfo. Generate with `nix key generate-secret --key-name your-cache-1`.
